Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Parryl Cryce]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — Parryl is the Green Knight and a Lichborn girl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Parryl is the Green Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Parryl uses a force-blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Parryl Cryce is a former Green Knight who was visible through an Aethertech capsule monitor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Parryl Cryce is a former Green Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Parryl is a Lichborn girl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Parryl has glowing green eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The narrator has ensured Parryl will survive long enough to complete a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Parryl is a Titan Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Parryl flies a green starfighter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — Parryl died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Parryl was held in a stasis chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Parryl expressed a wish to be out with Raion.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Parryl is in recovery and was attempting to climb into her Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Parryl is in the Green Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Parryl is a character mentioned in relation to taking Sola on a ride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Parryl is spending time with Doctor Cryce and Raion.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
